EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added dvPort group "{object.name}" to switch "{datafield8}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed dvPort group "{object.name}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} reconfigured dvPort group "{object.name}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} renamed dvPort group "{object.name}" on an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
